benefits.description: Raised testosterone levels from around 400 to 700 using GHRP-2 combined with improved sleep, diet, zinc, magnesium, and vitamin D

side_effects.description: Increased hunger from GHRP-2 (user states they like this effect)

protocol_notes: User also mentions taking CJC-1295 and Ipamorelin previously but had bad reaction to CJC. Testosterone increase attributed to combined protocol: GHRP-2, sleep optimization, diet, zinc, magnesium, vitamin D supplementation.
